programme.title: 🌊 2.5m @ 16s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.2m @ 18s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h S (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 15.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves
